eligibility_filter: exists(select 1 from transfer_performance_link_safe l where l.transfer_uid=t.transfer_uid)
leakage_or_selection_note: prior performance only in current safe link; future label not audited as leak-safe here | UNAVAILABLE_IN_THIS_ENVIRONMENT: requires transfer_performance_link_safe, sourced from ESTATE_B_DIR which is not present in this checkout/environment. Not a zero finding.
simpler_baseline: age + position + prior market value/league cohort baseline, evaluated by expanding window

eligibility_filter: exists(select 1 from transfer_performance_link_safe l where l.transfer_uid=t.transfer_uid and l.minutes is not null)

Not a zero finding.

eligibility_filter: t.player_id is not null and exists(select 1 from valuations v where v.player_id=t.player_id and v.date > cast(t.date as date) + interval 300 day and v.date <= cast(t.date as date) + interval 800 day)
leakage_or_selection_note: survival-observed valuation label; biased toward still-observed players
simpler_baseline: age + position + prior market value/league cohort baseline, evaluated by expanding window

eligibility_filter: t.player_id is not null and exists(select 1 from transfers_canonical f where f.player_id=t.player_id and f.date > t.date and f.fee_eur > 0)
leakage_or_selection_note: selected on resale and fee disclosure
simpler_baseline: age + position + prior market value/league cohort baseline, evaluated by expanding window
